interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including featured tours, packages, hotel deals, and highlighted blog articles.

interfaces.name: getTourFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the tours listing page.

interfaces.name: searchTours
interfaces.description: Search and filter tours for the tours listing page or homepage widget.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date for earliest departure, e.g. '2025-04-01'

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date for latest departure, e.g. '2025-04-30'

parameters.name: accommodationLevels
parameters.description: Array of accommodation level codes, e.g. ['standard_3_star']

interfaces.name: getTourDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific tour, including description, itinerary, and base pricing info.

parameters.name: tourId
parameters.description: ID of the tour selected from listing or URL.

interfaces.name: getTourAvailableDepartures
interfaces.description: Get available departures and pricing for a tour over a date range.

parameters.name: tourId
parameters.description: ID of the tour for which departures are requested.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date, earliest departure to include.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date, latest departure to include.

interfaces.name: getTourPricingPreview
interfaces.description: Calculate live price per person and total for a tour with given departure, travelers, and accommodation, without modifying cart.

interfaces.name: createTourBookingAndAddToCart
interfaces.description: Create a configured tour booking (dates, travelers, accommodation) and add it to the internal booking cart.

interfaces.name: getPackageFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the packages listing page.

interfaces.name: searchPackages
interfaces.description: Search and filter pre-built travel packages.

interfaces.name: getPackageComparison
interfaces.description: Get a comparison view for up to two selected packages.

parameters.name: packageIds
parameters.description: Array of package IDs to compare, typically length 2.

interfaces.name: addItemToWishlist
interfaces.description: Add a tour, package, hotel, or bundle item to the wishlist (wishlist container managed internally).

parameters.name: itemRefId
parameters.description: ID of the referenced Tour, Package, Hotel, or Bundle.

interfaces.name: getWishlistItems
interfaces.description: Get all items currently saved in the wishlist with user-friendly details.

interfaces.name: removeWishlistItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the wishlist.

parameters.name: wishlistItemId
parameters.description: ID of the wishlist item to remove.

interfaces.name: searchHotels
interfaces.description: Search hotels by city, date range, guests, and filters.

interfaces.name: getHotelFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the hotels listing page.

interfaces.name: getHotelDetailAndRooms
interfaces.description: Get detailed hotel information and available room types for specified dates and guests.

interfaces.name: createHotelBookingAndAddToCart
interfaces.description: Create a hotel booking for a selected room type and add it to the booking cart.

interfaces.name: searchBundles
interfaces.description: Search flight + hotel bundles by airports, dates, travelers, and filters.

interfaces.name: getBundleDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a selected flight + hotel bundle.

interfaces.name: createBundleBookingAndAddToCart
interfaces.description: Create a bundle booking for the selected bundle and add it to the cart.

interfaces.name: getBlogHomeContent
interfaces.description: Get featured and recent blog articles for the blog landing page.

interfaces.name: searchBlogArticles
interfaces.description: Search blog articles by keyword for the blog listing page.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full content for a blog article, including related articles and saved status.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article selected from listings or URL.

interfaces.name: saveArticle
interfaces.description: Save/bookmark a blog article to the user's saved articles list.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to save.

interfaces.name: unsaveArticle
interfaces.description: Remove a blog article from the saved articles list.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the article to unsave.

interfaces.name: getSavedArticlesAndReadingLists
interfaces.description: Get all saved articles and existing reading lists for the Saved Articles & Reading Lists page.

interfaces.name: createReadingList
interfaces.description: Create a new named reading list.

interfaces.name: addArticlesToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add one or more saved articles to a specific reading list.

parameters.name: articleIds
parameters.description: Array of article IDs to add.

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove an article from a specific reading list.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get a cart-like summary of all items currently in the booking cart.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemTravelers
interfaces.description: Update traveler counts for a specific cart item (where applicable).

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the cart item to update.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the booking cart.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the cart item to remove.

interfaces.name: submitTravelerDetails
interfaces.description: Submit traveler and contact information for the current booking before review or payment.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterOptions
interfaces.description: Get selectable topics and frequency options for the newsletter subscription form.

interfaces.name: createOrUpdateNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Create or update the single-user newsletter subscription.

interfaces.name: getTravelInsurancePlans
interfaces.description: Get available travel insurance plans/tiers with key feature summaries for the insurance plans page.

interfaces.name: configureInsurancePolicyForReview
interfaces.description: Configure an insurance policy for a specific plan and trip details, and return a reviewable policy summary.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: ID of the selected insurance plan (e.g. Standard tier).

parameters.name: tripCost
parameters.description: Total trip cost in USD, e.g. 3000.

interfaces.name: getTripBuilderCountryOptions
interfaces.description: Get destination countries available in the Custom Trip Builder.

interfaces.name: getTripBuilderCityOptions
interfaces.description: Get suggested cities for a given country in the Custom Trip Builder.

interfaces.name: getActivityTemplatesForCity
interfaces.description: Get available activity templates for a specific city and country for use in the Trip Builder.

interfaces.name: createCustomItinerary
interfaces.description: Create and save a multi-city custom itinerary with cities, dates, accommodation preference, and activities.

interfaces.name: getAboutUsContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About Us page including mission, background, and testimonials.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get static contact information and support details for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit an inquiry via the contact form.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user booking cart from storage and return its ID.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateNightsBetweenDates
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate number of nights between two dates for hotel and bundle bookings.

helperFunctions.name: _estimateTourPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute tour pricing based on departure, travelers, and accommodation level.

helperFunctions.name: _estimateHotelRoomTotalPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute total hotel booking price from room rate and nights.

helperFunctions.name: _estimateInsurancePremium
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to estimate insurance premiums from plan, trip cost, duration, and add-ons.
